function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request without clarification. I found the likely “house AI thing” project as `40_projects/2026_04_02_house_mesh/README.MD`, so its start date appears to be 2026-04-02 (from the project folder date prefix). But I found no canonical BlueMesa Quotebook project record in `40_projects/`, so I can’t determine whether it started earlier. Also, “delete the earliest project” is ambiguous because multiple project folders share the earliest date (2026-04-02), so there is no unique single deletion target. No files were modified or deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox-processing and deletion workflows: treat inbox as request, verify against canonical lanes, and do not delete when evidence does not uniquely support a target.
function.outcome_justification: `40_projects/` canonical records contain no BlueMesa Quotebook project (search returned zero matches), so the comparison cannot be verified from canonical evidence. The deletion request is non-unique because multiple project folders share the earliest creation-date prefix, which triggers the deletion workflow rule to stop and request clarification.
